parameters.description: Start and end nodes for the path OR node

standard.system_message: You are an expert in Graph Analysis through visualization. Always format your output as: FORMAT
standard.user_message: PROMPT FOR THE TASK. PARAMETERS IN THE FORM {params_start_node}, {params_end_node}, Format your answer as 'Length: <number>

cot.system_message: You are an expert in Graph Analysis through visualization. Always format your output as: 'Path: [comma-separated nodes], Length: <number>'
cot.user_message: Please find the shortest path between node {params_start_node} and node {params_end_node} in the graph. To solve this, reason step by step, then format your final answer as 'Path: [comma-separated nodes], Length: <number>'
